name: flightcrew
description: An independent multi-model review crew for coding agents: two blind cross-family reads plus an independent judge — report-only.
skillInstructions:
Kimi Code tool mapping for flightcrew-skills:

- When crew-review, crew-consult, or biascheck says to run the crew script, use Kimi Code's `Bash` tool to run the exact `node <resolved-path>/crew.mjs ...` command the skill shows.
- When a skill refers to the `Skill` tool, use Kimi Code's native `Skill` tool.
- The crew skills (crew-review, crew-consult, biascheck) each run one command and report its output verbatim — they never merge, fix, or act. The unbias skill is prompt-only: it runs no command, applies the tells catalog to the draft in the current session, and edits in place only when asked.

interface.shortDescription: An independent multi-model review crew for coding agents — report-only
interface.longDescription: Four skills. crew-review (git diffs), crew-consult (design docs), and biascheck (a writing draft) each run two blind parallel reads by different model families (Claude, Codex, Gemini/Antigravity) plus an independent judge that filters false positives, report-only: never merges, fixes, or acts. unbias is a prompt-only pass that applies the same tells catalog to a draft in the current session and edits it only on request.
